title: Best Diagnostic Centre & Path Lab Near Me in Delhi NCR - Janta X-Ray
heading: Featured Services
description: Janta X-Ray is best diagnostic center and path lab in Delhi NCR offering MRI, CT Scan, PET Scan, Ultrasound, X-Ray, DEXA, Mammogram, Blood tests etc in entire Delhi NCR.

Sometimes a business story is best told by patients who have been there. We are pleased to present these stories and testimonials by Janta X-Ray patients. Very supportive and polite staff , I was looking to get my old reports which I got In just few seconds from staff Yashoda Prashant Sharma  (Tilak Nagar, Delhi) Great support . Had a word with payal . She  answered all my queries and help me with best guidance.  She is kind , supportive  abd professional. Gaurav Arora  (Tilak Nagar, Delhi) This was my first baby and I have seen it inside my body before birth, it was an amazing experience and can't tell their technology is superb great. I got assured that everything was ok. Thank you Janta X-Ray team Anjali Singh  (Janakpuri, Delhi) I am really impressed services at Janta X-Ray for the quality, amenities and professional behaviour by staff members. Kuldeep Lamba (Saket, Delhi) I was looking for the ultrasound and got to know that I can see the real parts of the body inside and problem area, It was really a great experience and my doctor has given me instant treatment accordingly and I gone to Janta X-Ray to give this valuable feedback. Pramod Kumar (Dwarka, Delhi) I rate 5 out of 5 to Janta X-Ray good with their service and give report as per the commitments. Even the cost is super cheap than other pathology centers in Delhi. Maneesha Juneja (Tilak Nagar, Delhi) I was looking for Angiography and these guys really helped to me take to the their lab, taken test and dropped me at my home, I really got impressed and finally I can say that someone is there to help you.
